name: Framelink
description: MCP server giving Cursor, Claude Code, and other AI tools direct access to Figma design data — enabling accurate one-shot implementation of UI designs from prompts.

skills.name: Figma Design Access
skills.description: Fetch Figma frame data including layout, colors, typography, and component structure via MCP

skills.name: One-Shot Implementation
skills.description: Implement pixel-accurate UI components from Figma designs in a single agent code generation pass

skills.name: Asset Extraction
skills.description: Extract images, icons, and SVG assets from Figma frames for direct use in generated code output
